error.title: Couldn't reach MiniUnicorn
error.gatewayHint: Make sure the gateway is running (`miniUnicorn gateway`) and that this page is open on the same machine.

auth.title: Authentication required
auth.hint: Enter the secret configured as tokenIssueSecret in your gateway config.

account.logoutHint: Disconnect this browser from the gateway.

system.restartHint: Restart MiniUnicorn to apply runtime changes.

meta.description: MiniUnicorn web UI — chat with your MiniUnicorn workspace.

models.newConfigurationHelp: Save a provider and model as a one-click option.
models.editConfigurationHelp: Update the label, model, or credentials for this configuration.

help.theme: Switch between light and dark appearance.
help.language: Choose the language used by the WebUI.
help.provider: Select the provider that should serve new model requests.
help.model: Set the default model name used by MiniUnicorn.
help.configPath: The gateway configuration file currently in use.
help.currentModel: Choose the model MiniUnicorn uses for new replies.
help.contextWindow: Automatically queries Hugging Face for the model's context window size when saved, and persists the result permanently. Shows the learned value when not configured, or the configured value otherwise. Closed-source models not on HF require manual setup.
help.selectedPreset: Named presets are read-only here; edit them in config.json.
help.presetModel: Switch to Default to edit model and provider from the WebUI.
help.activityMode: Choose how much agent activity chrome to show by default.
help.codeWrap: Keep long code lines readable on smaller screens.
help.brandLogos: Show third-party provider and CLI logos in Settings.
help.timeout: Seconds before a search provider request times out.
help.cliAppsCatalog: Install only the app-specific CLI adapters MiniUnicorn can run locally; native apps stay untouched.
help.cliAppsFilter: Search by app, category, or capability.
help.localServiceAccess: Allow Full Access shell commands to reach localhost services.
help.webuiDefaultAccess: Used by web chats without a project-specific permission.
help.securityManagedControls: Web fetches always protect local, private, and metadata services. Core channel safety stays in config.json.
help.webSearchEnable: Toggle the web_search tool on/off. By default queries searxng + tavily + bing_cn concurrently and merges deduped results.
help.webSearchMaxResults: Maximum number of results returned per query (1-10).
help.webSearchProxy: HTTP proxy for overseas backends (e.g. tavily). Leave empty to use system HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY env vars.
help.webSearchUserAgent: Custom User-Agent for scraping backends. Leave empty to use default.
help.webSearchBackend_searxng: SearXNG self-hosted meta search (requires base_url, aggregates 100+ engines, free)
help.webSearchBackend_tavily: Tavily AI Search API (requires key, returns LLM summary, 1000/mo free)
help.logs: Open the native engine log folder.
help.diagnostics: Export a small runtime report for support.
help.localServiceAccessNative: Allow Full Access shell commands to reach services on this Mac.
help.webuiDefaultAccessNative: Used by native chats without a project-specific permission.
help.contextWindow: Choose the default context budget for this model configuration.
help.dream: Memory consolidation cron expression (e.g. '0 3 * * *' for daily at 3am). Timezone follows the main timezone setting.

cliApps.empty: No CLI Apps match this filter.
cliApps.readyPrompt: Use @{{name}} to inspect what this CLI can do.

status.restartAfterSaving: Save changes, then restart when ready.
status.hostRestartAfterSaving: Save changes and MiniUnicorn will restart its engine.
status.hostApiUnavailable: Host actions are only available inside the native app.

byok.description: Bring your own provider keys. MiniUnicorn reads these values from the current config and only configured providers can be selected in General.
byok.apiKeyConfiguredPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current key
byok.apiKeyRequired: API key is required to configure this provider.
byok.configureFirst: Configure a provider in BYOK first.
byok.deleteConfirmDescription: This will clear the provider's API key, API base, and associated model configurations. This action cannot be undone.
byok.customRequiredHint: Label, API base and model are required
byok.customProviderHelp: Configure a custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Saved as an independent provider card.
byok.affectedPresets: The following {{count}} model configuration(s) will also be deleted:

bootstrap.editorDescription: Loaded into the system prompt every turn. Edits apply on next message.

files.title: Dream Generated Files
files.description: Memory files written and maintained by the Dream consolidation process. Read-only.
files.notExistsHint: This file has not been created yet.
files.selectHint: Select a file from the list to view its content.

desc.SOUL.md: Agent persona/soul. Read in Dream Phase 1, may be edited in Phase 2.
desc.USER.md: Long-term user profile. Maintained by Dream from conversation history.
desc.memory/MEMORY.md: Long-term factual memory. Key facts distilled by Dream.
desc.memory/history.jsonl: Conversation history archive. Summaries of old messages by Consolidator/Dream.
desc.memory/procedural.jsonl: Procedural memory. Lessons distilled by Dream from reflections.
desc.memory/reflections.jsonl: Reflections. Written by Reflection, consumed by Dream.
desc.memory/shared/MEMORY_SHARED.md: Cross-session shared facts. Global knowledge promoted by Dream.
desc.memory/shared/procedural_shared.jsonl: Cross-session shared lessons. Global experience promoted by Dream.

planner.title: Plan & Execute dual model
planner.disabledHint: ReAct only. Toggle on to enable plan-and-execute.
planner.singleModelHint: Planner: main model · Executor: main model

apps.description: Add app CLIs and MCP services MiniUnicorn can use from chat.
apps.caption: {{cli}} CLI · {{mcp}} MCP

oauth.signInHelp: Sign in from this device; no API key is stored in config.
oauth.signInBeforeSaving: Sign in before saving this OAuth provider as the active model provider.

chat.renameDescription: Choose a local sidebar name for this chat.
chat.renameProjectDescription: Choose a local sidebar name for this project.

plan.title: Create a project plan
plan.prompt: Create a concise project plan for what I should build next.

analyze.title: Analyze this data
analyze.prompt: Help me analyze this data and call out the most important patterns.

brainstorm.title: Brainstorm ideas
brainstorm.prompt: Brainstorm a few practical ideas and tradeoffs for this problem.

code.title: Write code
code.prompt: Help me write the code for this task, starting with the smallest useful change.

summarize.title: Summarize this document
summarize.prompt: Summarize this document and list the key takeaways.

more.title: More
more.prompt: Show me a few useful ways you can help in this workspace.

composer.sendHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline
composer.expandInputHint: Expand input (Enter inserts newline, no send)
composer.attachTooltipDocs: Documents: PDF / Word / Excel / PPT / TXT / MD / CSV / JSON / XML / HTML / YAML, etc.

contextChip.tooltipUsage: Context: {{prompt}} prompt / {{completion}} completion / {{total}} total tokens ({{cached}} cached) · Window {{ctx}} · {{pct}}% used
contextChip.tooltipCtxOnly: {{count}} messages in context · {{tokens}} token context window
contextChip.tooltipEstimateHint: Estimated from message count; real usage arrives after sending

new.title: New chat
new.description: Stop the current task and start a fresh conversation.

stop.title: Stop current task
stop.description: Cancel the active agent turn for this chat.

restart.title: Restart MiniUnicorn
restart.description: Restart the bot process in place.

status.title: Show status
status.description: Display runtime, provider, and channel status.

model.title: Model
model.description: Show or switch the active model preset.

history.title: Show conversation history
history.description: Print the last N persisted conversation messages.

dream_log.title: Show Dream log
dream_log.description: Show what the last Dream consolidation changed.

dream_restore.title: Restore memory
dream_restore.description: Revert memory to a previous Dream snapshot.

goal.title: Long-running goal
goal.description: Tell the agent to treat this as a sustained multi-step goal.

mentions.label: Apps
mentions.cliDescription: Use @{{name}} as a local CLI app

imageRejected.magic_mismatch: File doesn't look like a real image
imageRejected.too_large: Image is too large — try a smaller one

messageTooBig.title: Message too large
messageTooBig.body: The server rejected your last message because it exceeded the size limit. Remove some images or try smaller files, then send again.

workspaceScopeRejected.title: Workspace was not changed
workspaceScopeRejected.body: MiniUnicorn kept the previous workspace because the requested project or access mode was rejected by the gateway.

dialog.absolutePathRequired: Enter an absolute folder path on this machine.

mcp.title: MCP Services
mcp.empty: No MCP presets match this filter.

validation.commandRequired: Command is required for stdio transport
validation.urlRequired: URL is required for HTTP transport
validation.invalidJsonArgs: Arguments must be a valid JSON array
validation.invalidJsonEnv: Environment variables must be a valid JSON object
validation.invalidJsonHeaders: Headers must be a valid JSON object

skills.title: Skills
skills.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. The skill files will be permanently deleted.
skills.uploadHint: Choose a .zip skill package (must contain SKILL.md)
skills.editorPlaceholder: Write the SKILL.md content here (with YAML frontmatter)...
skills.nameHelp: Letters, numbers, dots, dashes and underscores only.
skills.builtinReadonly: Built-in skills are read-only. Create a workspace copy to edit.

template.description: Describe what this skill does in one sentence.

skillDescriptions.document-processing: Create, edit, convert, and analyze documents (PDF/Word/Excel/PPT)
skillDescriptions.github: Interact with GitHub via the gh CLI (issues, PRs, CI, API)
skillDescriptions.image-generation: Generate images and iteratively edit saved image artifacts
skillDescriptions.long-goal: Manage sustained objectives via long_task / complete_goal
skillDescriptions.memory: Two-layer memory system with Dream-managed knowledge files
skillDescriptions.my: Check and set the agent's own runtime state
skillDescriptions.summarize: Summarize or extract text from URLs, podcasts, and local files
skillDescriptions.tmux: Remote-control tmux sessions by sending keystrokes and scraping output
skillDescriptions.update-setup: One-time setup wizard for the MiniUnicorn upgrade skill
skillDescriptions.weather: Get current weather and forecasts (no API key required)

agents.title: Agents
agents.name: Name
agents.nameHelp: Letters, numbers, dots, dashes and underscores only.
agents.descriptionPlaceholder: One-line summary of what this agent does
agents.modelPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the default model
agents.defaultSystemPrompt: You are a specialized subagent. Describe your responsibilities here.
agents.editorPlaceholder: Write the .md content here (with YAML frontmatter)...
agents.empty: No subagents defined yet. Create a .md file in the agents/ directory to define one.
agents.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. The agent definition file will be permanently deleted.
agents.generateDescription: Describe what this agent should do (e.g. "a code reviewer that checks for security issues and suggests improvements")...

cron.title: Scheduled tasks
cron.empty: No scheduled tasks yet. Click "New" to create one.

field.name: Name
field.messagePlaceholder: Prompt delivered to the agent when the task runs
field.atHint: One-shot, runs once at the chosen time

error.everySecondsInvalid: Interval must be at least 60 seconds

field.hint: The file must define a class inheriting from Tool. Restart the gateway after import to load it.

toolDescriptions.apply_patch: Default code-edit tool; supports multi-file changes in one call
toolDescriptions.complete_goal: End bookkeeping for the active sustained goal
toolDescriptions.create_agent: Generate a subagent definition file from a natural-language description
toolDescriptions.delegate: Delegate a task to a specialized subagent
toolDescriptions.edit_file: Perform a small, exact replacement in a single file
toolDescriptions.exec: Execute a shell command and return its output
toolDescriptions.execute_plan: Execute a multi-step plan by spawning one subagent per step
toolDescriptions.find_files: Find files by path fragment, glob, or file type
toolDescriptions.grep: Search file contents with a regex pattern
toolDescriptions.list_dir: List the contents of a directory (supports recursive)
toolDescriptions.long_task: Mark this thread as a sustained long-running task
toolDescriptions.message: Proactively send a message to a user/channel, optionally with files
toolDescriptions.my: Check and set the agent's own runtime state
toolDescriptions.read_file: Read a file (text, image, or document)
toolDescriptions.recall: Search past memories and conversation summaries
toolDescriptions.run_cli_app: Run a CLI App installed in Settings
toolDescriptions.spawn: Spawn a subagent to handle a task in the background
toolDescriptions.web_fetch: Fetch a URL and extract readable content
toolDescriptions.web_search: Search the web by keyword with SearXNG (self-hosted meta search aggregating 100+ engines) as primary, plus Tavily AI summaries and Bing CN fallback; concurrent query with dedup merge and auto-caching; returns titles, URLs, and snippets
toolDescriptions.deep_research: Multi-step research workflow (plan, search, fetch, reflect, rerank, write) powered by SearXNG-primary concurrent search with full-text fetching and auto-reflection; returns a cited Markdown report
toolDescriptions.write_file: Create a new file or intentionally replace an entire file
toolDescriptions.write_stdin: Write to stdin or control a running exec session

channels.title: Channels
channels.defaultHint: Not configured: below are default values. Edit and save to apply.

qr.title: Scan to log in
qr.description: Use the mobile app to scan the QR code to automatically create a bot and complete login.
qr.scanHint: Scanning will automatically create a bot application and write credentials to config.json.

errors.title: QR login failed
errors.beginFailed: Unable to start QR login flow

channelDescriptions.dingtalk: DingTalk bot channel using Stream Mode
channelDescriptions.feishu: Feishu / Lark bot channel via WebSocket long connection
channelDescriptions.qq: QQ channel bot based on official botpy SDK
channelDescriptions.wecom: WeCom AI Bot channel via WebSocket long connection
channelDescriptions.weixin: Personal WeChat channel based on iLink protocol

_common.enabled_desc: When on, this channel will receive and send messages
_common.allow_from_desc: Allowed user/chat IDs, one per line; empty means allow all

dingtalk.allow_remote_media_redirects_desc: Follow HTTP redirects when downloading remote media
dingtalk.remote_media_redirect_allowed_hosts_desc: Hosts allowed during media redirects, one per line
dingtalk.group_user_isolation_desc: When on, each user in a group chat has its own session

feishu.instance_id_desc: Unique identifier for this Feishu instance (multi-account)
feishu.name: Bot Name
feishu.identity_key_desc: Optional key to distinguish identity across instances
feishu.app_id_desc: Feishu App ID (from Feishu Open Platform)
feishu.react_emoji_desc: Emoji name to react with on message receive (e.g. THUMBSUP)
feishu.done_emoji_desc: Emoji name to react with on task completion (empty = none)
feishu.tool_hint_prefix_desc: Inline prefix for tool invocation hints
feishu.reply_to_message_desc: When on, bot replies quote the user's original message
feishu.streaming_desc: When on, replies are pushed in streaming mode
feishu.topic_isolation_desc: When on, each topic in group chat has its own session

qq.app_id_desc: QQ bot AppID (from QQ Open Platform)
qq.msg_format_desc: Format for outbound messages: plain=text, markdown=Markdown
qq.ack_message_desc: Placeholder reply sent immediately on receive

wecom.bot_id_desc: WeCom AI Bot ID (from WeCom admin console)
wecom.welcome_message_desc: Message sent when user enters chat (empty = none)

weixin.token_desc: Login token (manual or auto-obtained via QR login)
